items.title: Getting Here
items.text: Add directions, parking info and accessibility details so visitors know where to go on matchday.

items.title: Club Colours
items.text: Describe your home and away kits, and any heritage details about your colours.

items.title: Refreshments
items.text: Tell visitors about the kitchen, bar and any matchday catering options.

items.title: Dog-friendly
items.text: Set out your club's policy on dogs and other pets at the ground.
